query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS perf_sync_history (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  synced_by VARCHAR(64),
  synced_by_name VARCHAR(255),
  status VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'processing',
  total_employees INT DEFAULT 0,
  files_uploaded INT DEFAULT 0,
  error_message TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  completed_at TIMESTAMP NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS perf_employees (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  ohr INT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  planning_group VARCHAR(100),
  sup_name VARCHAR(255),
  shift_time VARCHAR(50),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS perf_employee_metrics (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  ohr INT NOT NULL,
  timeframe_key VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  timeframe_label VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  timeframe_type VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  utilization DOUBLE,
  occupancy DOUBLE,
  throughput DOUBLE,
  aht DOUBLE,
  nht DOUBLE,
  closures DOUBLE,
  sync_id INT,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY uq_ohr_tf (ohr, timeframe_key)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS perf_daily_raw_metrics (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  ohr INT NOT NULL,
  we_date VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  production_sec DOUBLE DEFAULT 0,
  production_work_sec DOUBLE DEFAULT 0,
  srt_billable_sec DOUBLE DEFAULT 0,
  decisioned_count DOUBLE DEFAULT 0,
  ticket_count DOUBLE DEFAULT 0,
  ht_sec DOUBLE DEFAULT 0,
  nht_sec DOUBLE DEFAULT 0,
  tht_sec DOUBLE DEFAULT 0,
  skip_count DOUBLE DEFAULT 0,
  volume DOUBLE DEFAULT 0,
  sync_id INT,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  UNIQUE KEY uq_ohr_we (ohr, we_date)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS perf_dashboard_meta (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  meta_key VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  meta_value JSON NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS perf_source_files (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  file_key VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  original_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  s3_key VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  s3_url TEXT NOT NULL,
  file_size INT DEFAULT 0,
  mime_type VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet',
  uploaded_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP NOT NULL
);
